title: Toyland® Pack of 6 Die Cast Metal Farm Tractor & Implements Set - Approx. 5cm - 4 Assorted Designs - 1 Chosen at Random
features: Product Measurements: Approximately 5cm Product Features: 2 Tractors & 4 Implements Including: combine harvester, crop cutter, trailers & more!
Product Specifications: Made from Die Cast Metal & Plastic - Not suitable for children under 3 years
Start your collection of farm vehicles today with this set of 6 farm tractors and implements. With 2 tractors, and 4 implements per set, there are endless ways of playing with these farm toys
The perfect start to your farm toy collection, or a great addition to your existing farm toys. Start your collection today!
There are 4 assorted sets - You will receive 1 at random (6 pces in total).
description: Start your collection of farm vehicles today with this set of 6 farm tractors and implements. With 2 tractors, and 4 implements per set, there are endless ways of playing with these farm toys. The perfect start to your farm toy collection, or a great addition to your existing farm toys. Start your collection today! Each toy is approximately 5cm tall and is made from die cast metal and plastic. There are 4 assorted sets of farm tractors, each with 2 tractors and 4 implements. There are 4 assorted sets - You will receive 1 at random (6 pces in total).
